zh.lifeSummary: 當John Oakley於1510年出生在英國史洛普爾比曉普也斯 卡素時，他的父親John Roger Oakley46歲，母親Joan Raynald42歲。他於1540年與Margaret在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1586年10月18日在英國米德萊可雷迪其享年76歲。

nameMeanings.name: Oakley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly West Midlands): habitational name from any of numerous places called Oakley, Oakle, or Oakleigh, in Bedfordshire, Essex, Gloucestershire, Hampshire, Kent, Somerset, Suffolk, or Wiltshire. The placenames derive from Old English āc ‘oak’ + lēah ‘open woodland’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When John Oakley was born in 1510, in Bishop's Castle, Shropshire, England, his father, John Roger Oakley, was 46 and his mother, Joan Raynald, was 42. He married Margaret in 1540, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 18 October 1586, in Shoreditch, Middlesex, England, at the age of 76.

ko.London, London, England: 미국 미시간 주 먼로 런던 타운시프 런던
ko.lifeSummary: John Oakley(이)가 1510년 영국 슈럽실르 비숍'스 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Roger Oakley(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Raynald(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1540년 영국 런던에서 Margaret(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1586년 10월 18일 영국 미들레세스 쇼레딧치에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.
